svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="User Registration" id="Md07MzhQ_YLtNMia1D9n"> <mxGraphModel dx="1323" dy="715" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="200" pageHeight="413" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-251" parent="1" style="shape=rect;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;align=center;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Vehicle Tracking System" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="400" width="760" x="140" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-252" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;" value="Fleet Manager" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="30" x="30" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-253" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Navigate to
Live Map Page" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="180" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-254" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Interact with Map
(Zoom / Pan)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="180" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-255" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="View Vehicle Info
(Click Marker)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="180" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-256" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Fetch Positions from
AWS Kinesis Stream" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="440" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-257" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Render/Refresh
Map Markers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="440" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-258" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Handle Stream
Unavailable (Alternate)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="700" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-259" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Display Empty State
(Alternate)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="700" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-260" edge="1" parent="1" source="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-252" style="endArrow=none;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-253"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-261" edge="1" parent="1" source="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-252" style="endArrow=none;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-254"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> target="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-255"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-263" edge="1" parent="1" source="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-253"
